label: Gene
description: Defines a gene that can be present in a pawn's genome. Genes affect appearance, stats, abilities, needs, and behavior.

geneClass.label: Gene class
geneClass.description: C# Gene subclass that implements this gene's runtime behavior. Defaults to Gene.

labelShortAdj.label: Label short adjective
labelShortAdj.description: Short adjective label shown in condensed UI contexts. Falls back to the full label when absent.

customEffectDescriptions.label: Custom effect descriptions
customEffectDescriptions.description: Additional effect description lines appended to the gene's description in the UI.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Content-relative path to the gene icon texture.

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.description: Tint color applied to the gene icon. Format: (r, g, b) or (r, g, b, a) with components 0–1 or 0–255.

displayCategory.label: Display category
displayCategory.description: GeneCategoryDef that groups this gene in the gene editor UI. Defaults to Miscellaneous.

displayOrderInCategory.label: Display order in category
displayOrderInCategory.description: Sort position within the display category. Lower values appear first.

renderNodeProperties.label: Render node properties
renderNodeProperties.description: Pawn render node configurations added to the pawn while this gene is active.

neverGrayHair.label: Never gray hair
neverGrayHair.description: If true, the pawn's hair never grays with age while this gene is active.

skinIsHairColor.label: Skin is hair color
skinIsHairColor.description: If true, the pawn's skin color is derived from their hair color.

tattoosVisible.label: Tattoos visible
tattoosVisible.description: If true, tattoos are rendered on the pawn. Defaults to true.

fur.label: Fur
fur.description: FurDef applied to the pawn while this gene is active.

soundCall.label: Sound call
soundCall.description: SoundDef played when the pawn calls out.

soundDeath.label: Sound death
soundDeath.description: SoundDef played when the pawn dies.

soundWounded.label: Sound wounded
soundWounded.description: SoundDef played when the pawn is wounded.

resourceGizmoType.label: Resource gizmo type
resourceGizmoType.description: C# GeneGizmo subclass used to display the resource bar in the UI.

resourceLossPerDay.label: Resource loss per day
resourceLossPerDay.description: Amount of gene resource consumed per in-game day. Negative values mean the resource fills over time.

resourceLabel.label: Resource label
resourceLabel.description: Translated label shown in the resource gizmo.

resourceDescription.label: Resource description
resourceDescription.description: Translated description shown in the resource gizmo tooltip.

resourceGizmoThresholds.label: Resource gizmo thresholds
resourceGizmoThresholds.description: Threshold values (0–1) drawn as markers on the resource bar.

showGizmoOnWorldView.label: Show gizmo on world view
showGizmoOnWorldView.description: If true, the resource gizmo is shown while the pawn is on the world map.

showGizmoWhenDrafted.label: Show gizmo when drafted
showGizmoWhenDrafted.description: If true, the resource gizmo is shown when the pawn is drafted.

showGizmoOnMultiSelect.label: Show gizmo on multi-select
showGizmoOnMultiSelect.description: If true, the resource gizmo is shown when multiple pawns are selected.

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs granted to the pawn while this gene is active.

forcedTraits.label: Forced traits
forcedTraits.description: Traits forced onto the pawn while this gene is active. Each entry specifies a trait and degree.

suppressedTraits.label: Suppressed traits
suppressedTraits.description: Traits suppressed on the pawn while this gene is active. Each entry specifies a trait and degree.

enablesNeeds.label: Enables needs
enablesNeeds.description: NeedDefs enabled on the pawn by this gene.

disablesNeeds.label: Disables needs
disablesNeeds.description: NeedDefs disabled on the pawn by this gene.

disabledWorkTags.label: Disabled work tags
disabledWorkTags.description: Work tags disabled by this gene. Each list item is a WorkTags flag value.

ignoreDarkness.label: Ignore darkness
ignoreDarkness.description: If true, the pawn ignores darkness penalties to mood and work speed.

endogeneCategory.label: Endogene category
endogeneCategory.description: Category used when this gene is an endogene. Controls which appearance slot it occupies.

dislikesSunlight.label: Dislikes sunlight
dislikesSunlight.description: If true, the pawn suffers mood and potentially health penalties from sunlight exposure.

minAgeActive.label: Min age active
minAgeActive.description: Minimum biological age in years before this gene takes effect.

lovinMTBFactor.label: Lovin MTB factor
lovinMTBFactor.description: Multiplier on the mean time between lovin' events for this pawn.

immuneToToxGasExposure.label: Immune to tox gas exposure
immuneToToxGasExposure.description: If true, the pawn is immune to toxic gas exposure hediffs.

immuneToVacuumBurns.label: Immune to vacuum burns
immuneToVacuumBurns.description: If true, the pawn does not receive vacuum burn hediffs in airless environments.

randomChosen.label: Random chosen
randomChosen.description: If true, this gene is eligible for random selection even when it has no biostat cost.

waterCellCost.label: Water cell cost
waterCellCost.description: Additional pathfinding cost when moving through water cells.

deathHistoryEvent.label: Death history event
deathHistoryEvent.description: HistoryEventDef fired when a pawn with this gene dies.

aptitudes.label: Aptitudes
aptitudes.description: Skill aptitude adjustments granted by this gene.

passionMod.label: Passion mod
passionMod.description: Modifies a pawn's passion for a skill while this gene is active.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied by this gene. Keys are StatDef names; values are float offsets.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Stat multipliers applied by this gene. Keys are StatDef names; values are float factors.

conditionalStatAffecters.label: Conditional stat affecters
conditionalStatAffecters.description: Stat offsets and factors that apply only when a specific condition is met.

painOffset.label: Pain offset
painOffset.description: Flat offset added to the pawn's pain level (0–1 scale).

painFactor.label: Pain factor
painFactor.description: Multiplier on the pawn's pain level. Values below 1 reduce pain; above 1 increase it.

foodPoisoningChanceFactor.label: Food poisoning chance factor
foodPoisoningChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the pawn's chance of getting food poisoning. 0 means immune.

damageFactors.label: Damage factors
damageFactors.description: Multipliers applied to incoming damage of specific types.

biologicalAgeTickFactorFromAgeCurve.label: Biological age tick factor from age curve
biologicalAgeTickFactorFromAgeCurve.description: Curve mapping chronological age (x) to a biological age tick rate multiplier (y). Used for genes that age at different rates.

makeImmuneTo.label: Make immune to
makeImmuneTo.description: HediffDefs that the pawn is immune to while this gene is active.

hediffGiversCannotGive.label: Hediff givers cannot give
hediffGiversCannotGive.description: HediffDefs that hediff givers are prevented from applying to this pawn.

chemical.label: Chemical
chemical.description: ChemicalDef associated with this gene for addiction and tolerance calculations.

addictionChanceFactor.label: Addiction chance factor
addictionChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the pawn's chance of becoming addicted to the associated chemical. 0 means immune.

overdoseChanceFactor.label: Overdose chance factor
overdoseChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the pawn's chance of overdosing on the associated chemical.

toleranceBuildupFactor.label: Tolerance buildup factor
toleranceBuildupFactor.description: Multiplier on how quickly the pawn builds tolerance to the associated chemical.

sterilize.label: Sterilize
sterilize.description: If true, the pawn cannot reproduce while this gene is active.

capMods.label: Capacity modifiers
capMods.description: Pawn capacity adjustments applied by this gene.

preventPermanentWounds.label: Prevent permanent wounds
preventPermanentWounds.description: If true, injuries on this pawn never become permanent wounds.

dontMindRawFood.label: Don't mind raw food
dontMindRawFood.description: If true, the pawn does not receive mood penalties for eating raw food.

hairColorOverride.label: Hair color override
hairColorOverride.description: Replaces the pawn's hair color. Format: (r, g, b) or (r, g, b, a) with components 0–1 or 0–255.

skinColorBase.label: Skin color base
skinColorBase.description: Base skin color used when this gene controls the pawn's melanin appearance. Format: (r, g, b) or (r, g, b, a).

skinColorOverride.label: Skin color override
skinColorOverride.description: Directly overrides the pawn's skin color. Format: (r, g, b) or (r, g, b, a).

randomBrightnessFactor.label: Random brightness factor
randomBrightnessFactor.description: If nonzero, skin brightness is randomized up to this fraction above and below the base color.

hairTagFilter.label: Hair tag filter
hairTagFilter.description: Tag filter controlling which hair styles are available to pawns with this gene.

beardTagFilter.label: Beard tag filter
beardTagFilter.description: Tag filter controlling which beard styles are available to pawns with this gene.

bodyType.label: Body type
bodyType.description: Forces the pawn to use a specific body type. Leave empty to use the pawn's normal body type.

forcedHeadTypes.label: Forced head types
forcedHeadTypes.description: HeadTypeDefs the pawn can be assigned. One is chosen randomly if multiple are listed.

minMelanin.label: Min melanin
minMelanin.description: Minimum melanin value (0–1) allowed for this pawn. -1 means no minimum.

forcedHair.label: Forced hair
forcedHair.description: HairDef forced onto the pawn while this gene is active.

womenCanHaveBeards.label: Women can have beards
womenCanHaveBeards.description: If true, female pawns with this gene are eligible for beard styles.

socialFightChanceFactor.label: Social fight chance factor
socialFightChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the pawn's chance of initiating a social fight.

aggroMentalBreakSelectionChanceFactor.label: Aggro mental break selection chance factor
aggroMentalBreakSelectionChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on how likely this pawn is to have an aggressive mental break selected when one occurs.

mentalBreakMtbDays.label: Mental break MTB days
mentalBreakMtbDays.description: Mean time between gene-triggered mental breaks in days. Requires mentalBreakDef.

mentalBreakDef.label: Mental break def
mentalBreakDef.description: MentalBreakDef triggered by this gene's mentalBreakMtbDays timer.

missingGeneRomanceChanceFactor.label: Missing gene romance chance factor
missingGeneRomanceChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the romance chance when the other pawn is missing this gene.

prisonBreakMTBFactor.label: Prison break MTB factor
prisonBreakMTBFactor.description: Multiplier on the mean time between prison break attempts. Negative values prevent prison breaks entirely.

biostatCpx.label: Biostat complexity
biostatCpx.description: Gene complexity cost. Higher values make the xenotype harder to maintain.

biostatMet.label: Biostat metabolism
biostatMet.description: Metabolism impact. Negative values increase food consumption; positive values reduce it.

biostatArc.label: Biostat architech
biostatArc.description: Number of Archite capsules required to unlock this gene in the gene assembler.

exclusionTags.label: Exclusion tags
exclusionTags.description: Genes sharing any exclusion tag cannot be active simultaneously in the same xenotype.

prerequisite.label: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: GeneDef that must be present in the xenotype for this gene to take effect.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative probability that this gene is chosen during random xenotype generation.

canGenerateInGeneSet.label: Can generate in gene set
canGenerateInGeneSet.description: If false, this gene is excluded from random xenotype generation.

symbolPack.label: Symbol pack
symbolPack.description: Weighted name symbol lists used when generating gene-based xenotype names.

marketValueFactor.label: Market value factor
marketValueFactor.description: Multiplier on the market value of genepacks containing this gene.

removeOnRedress.label: Remove on redress
removeOnRedress.description: If true, this gene is removed from the pawn when they change apparel.

passOnDirectly.label: Pass on directly
passOnDirectly.description: If true, this gene is directly inherited by offspring without going through germ cells.

selectionWeightFactorDarkSkin.label: Selection weight factor dark skin
selectionWeightFactorDarkSkin.description: Multiplier on the selection weight when generating a dark-skinned xenotype.

selectionWeightCultist.label: Selection weight cultist
selectionWeightCultist.description: Multiplier on the selection weight when generating a cultist xenotype.
